title: Online display with limited assortment capacity
prompt: An online seller can display at most eight products above the fold. It chooses the displayed set once per day using estimated choice probabilities and margins. The model does not include position effects or dynamic personalization. Frame the setting without adding either feature for narrative appeal.

model_specification.mechanism: Display eligibility determines the choice set from which modeled visitors purchase or exit.

prohibited_inferences: The display adapts to each visitor

evidence_needs.claim: Eight items fit above the fold
